hero.description: I build scalable software solutions with a focus on clean code and exceptional user experience.

about.title: About Me
about.highlight: Building high-performance software with clean code and robust architecture.
about.description: I'm a passionate developer with a keen eye for design and a drive for creating seamless digital experiences. With a strong foundation in modern web technologies, I transform complex requirements into elegant, user-friendly solutions.

bmsintel.title: BMS Intel
bmsintel.description: All-in-one building management platform that unifies critical systems for performance optimization and predictive analytics. Features real-time IoT monitoring, multi-building oversight, and end-to-end encryption.

citycommute.title: CityCommute
citycommute.description: High-fidelity agent-based urban mobility simulation engine. Features real-time visualization of multi-modal transport (cars, pedestrians, buses) using A* pathfinding and high-performance WebSockets. Provides deep analytics on traffic efficiency and agent behavior.

jobs.description: Led the architecture, core software development, and multi-tenant infrastructure deployment for BMS Intel, a large-scale Building Management System utilizing Next.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, and WebSockets.
contributions: Led the architecture and development of BMS Intel, a large-scale Building Management System built with Next.js, NestJS, and PostgreSQL, enabling real-time industrial device control via WebSockets.
Led a system-wide ID migration (numeric UUID/string) across 100+ files, enabling global scalability and cross-service consistency.
Architected core backend systems including a Work Order module and a command execution system with UUID-based request tracking for reliable hardware control.
Built shared platform infrastructure including a centralized File Service and a hardware metadata engine with GitHub synchronization and Redis caching.
Implemented advanced authentication systems including Passkeys (WebAuthn), backup codes, and Redis-based challenge flows.
Architected and scaled a multi-tenant admin platform and production infrastructure using Docker and CI/CD, supporting multiple products.

jobs.description: Developed automated data extraction pipelines, custom PDF reporting systems, and dynamic invoice visualization interfaces using Django and Scala.
contributions: Developed personalized PDF summary reports by extracting and synthesizing data from financial account statements.
Utilized Django to dynamically present key data from invoices in the user interface.
Implemented automated tests to ensure code quality and streamline deployment processes.
Enhanced the development environment setup to facilitate onboarding for future developers at Listo Servicios Digitales.

schools.degree: B.S. in Computer Science and Technology

footer.title: Let's Connect
footer.description: Open for new opportunities. Let's build something amazing together.
